resultTitle.en: This product may be unsafe to use.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这个产品使用起来可能不安全。

resultSummary.en: The product seems dangerous, behaves unusually, or may cause harm.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 这个产品看起来存在危险、表现异常，或可能造成伤害。

summary.en: Stop using the product immediately
summary.zh-Hans: 立即停止使用该产品

text.en: Stop using the product immediately.
text.zh-Hans: 立即停止使用该产品。

summary.en: Move it away from children, bedding, or anything flammable if needed
summary.zh-Hans: 如有需要，将它移离儿童、床品或可燃物

text.en: Move it away from children, bedding, or anything flammable if needed.
text.zh-Hans: 如有需要，将它移离儿童、床品或任何可燃物。

summary.en: Do not keep testing it repeatedly
summary.zh-Hans: 不要反复测试它

text.en: Do not keep testing it repeatedly.
text.zh-Hans: 不要继续反复测试它。

summary.en: Take photos or videos of the issue if it is safe to do so
summary.zh-Hans: 如果安全的话，拍下问题的照片或视频

text.en: Take photos or videos of the issue if it is safe to do so.
text.zh-Hans: 如果这样做是安全的，拍下问题的照片或视频。

summary.en: Keep the receipt, packaging, and product details
summary.zh-Hans: 保留收据、包装和产品信息

text.en: Keep the receipt, packaging, and product details.
text.zh-Hans: 保留收据、包装和产品信息。

summary.en: Be ready to explain clearly what happened
summary.zh-Hans: 准备好清楚说明发生了什么

text.en: Be ready to explain clearly what happened.
text.zh-Hans: 准备好清楚说明发生了什么。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather the receipt or proof of purchase, packaging or label, photos or video of the issue, and a short note about when and how the problem happened.
default.zh-Hans: 收集收据或购买凭证、包装或标签、问题照片或视频，以及问题何时、如何发生的简短记录。

unsafe.en: Gather the receipt or proof of purchase, packaging or label, photos or video of the issue, and a short note about when and how the problem happened.
unsafe.zh-Hans: 收集收据或购买凭证、包装或标签、问题照片或视频，以及问题何时、如何发生的简短记录。

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

summary.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
summary.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

text.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
text.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

resultTitle.en: This looks like a product quality or defect concern.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这看起来像是产品质量或故障问题。

resultSummary.en: The product may be faulty, poor quality, damaged, or not working as expected.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 这个产品可能存在故障、质量差、损坏，或无法正常工作。

summary.en: Work out exactly what seems wrong
summary.zh-Hans: 先弄清楚具体出了什么问题

text.en: Work out exactly what seems wrong.
text.zh-Hans: 先弄清楚具体出了什么问题。

summary.en: Stop using it first if there may be any risk
summary.zh-Hans: 如果存在任何风险，先停止使用

text.en: Stop using it first if there may be any risk.
text.zh-Hans: 如果存在任何风险，先停止使用它。

summary.en: Gather your evidence before contacting the seller
summary.zh-Hans: 联系卖家前先收集证据

text.en: Gather your evidence before contacting the seller.
text.zh-Hans: 联系卖家前先把证据准备好。

summary.en: Write down what happened in simple terms
summary.zh-Hans: 用简单的话写下发生了什么

text.en: Write down what happened in simple terms.
text.zh-Hans: 用简单的话写下发生了什么。

summary.en: Ask the seller clearly whether they can inspect, replace, or refund the product
summary.zh-Hans: 明确询问卖家是否会检查、更换或退款

text.en: Ask the seller clearly whether they can inspect, replace, or refund the product.
text.zh-Hans: 明确询问卖家是否会检查、更换或退款。

summary.en: Keep their reply if it is vague or dismissive
summary.zh-Hans: 保存对方含糊或敷衍的回复

text.en: Keep their reply if it is vague or dismissive.
text.zh-Hans: 如果对方回复含糊或敷衍，请保存下来。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, packaging or label details, and notes on what happened and when.
default.zh-Hans: 收集收据、产品照片、包装或标签信息，以及关于何时发生、发生了什么的记录。

quality_or_fault.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, packaging or label details, and notes on what happened and when.
quality_or_fault.zh-Hans: 收集收据、产品照片、包装或标签信息，以及关于何时发生、发生了什么的记录。

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

summary.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
summary.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

text.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
text.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

resultTitle.en: You are not sure whether this is a safety issue or a quality problem.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 您还不确定这是安全问题还是质量问题。

resultSummary.en: That is okay. Start by treating any possible risk seriously and gathering the facts.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 没关系，先认真对待任何可能的风险，并把事实整理清楚。

summary.en: If there may be any risk, stop using the product first
summary.zh-Hans: 如果存在任何风险，先停止使用产品

text.en: If there may be any risk, stop using the product first.
text.zh-Hans: 如果存在任何风险，先停止使用产品。

summary.en: Gather your receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes
summary.zh-Hans: 收集收据、包装、照片、视频和记录

text.en: Gather your receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes.
text.zh-Hans: 收集收据、包装、照片、视频和记录。

summary.en: Write down what feels wrong and when it happened
summary.zh-Hans: 写下哪里不对，以及何时发生

text.en: Write down what feels wrong and when it happened.
text.zh-Hans: 写下哪里不对，以及问题何时发生。

summary.en: Start by asking the seller clearly what they will do to inspect, replace, or refund it
summary.zh-Hans: 先明确询问卖家会如何检查、更换或退款

text.en: Start by asking the seller clearly what they will do to inspect, replace, or refund it.
text.zh-Hans: 先明确询问卖家会如何检查、更换或退款。

summary.en: Keep everything in writing as much as possible
summary.zh-Hans: 尽量保留书面记录

text.en: Keep everything in writing as much as possible.
text.zh-Hans: 尽量把所有沟通保留成书面记录。

summary.en: Relevant evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 相关证据

default.en: Gather any receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes you still have.
default.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、包装、照片、视频和记录。

uncertain_type.en: Gather any receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes you still have.
uncertain_type.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、包装、照片、视频和记录。

not_sure.en: Gather any receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes you still have.
not_sure.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、包装、照片、视频和记录。

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

summary.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
summary.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

text.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
text.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

resultSummary.en: If the product may still be unsafe, deal with the safety risk before anything else.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 如果产品仍然可能存在安全风险，请先处理安全问题，再考虑其他步骤。

summary.en: Stop using the product immediately
summary.zh-Hans: 立即停止使用该产品

text.en: Stop using the product immediately.
text.zh-Hans: 立即停止使用该产品。

summary.en: Move it away from anything flammable if needed
summary.zh-Hans: 如有需要，将它移离任何可燃物

text.en: Move it away from anything flammable if needed.
text.zh-Hans: 如有需要，将它移离任何可燃物。

summary.en: Do not keep testing it
summary.zh-Hans: 不要继续反复测试它

text.en: Do not keep testing it.
text.zh-Hans: 不要继续反复测试它。

summary.en: Only take photos or videos if it is safe to do so
summary.zh-Hans: 只有在安全的前提下才拍照或录像

text.en: Only take photos or videos if it is safe to do so.
text.zh-Hans: 只有在这样做是安全的情况下，才拍照或录像。

summary.en: Basic evidence of what happened
summary.zh-Hans: 发生情况的基础证据

text.en: Basic evidence of what happened

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

resultTitle.en: Save and organise your evidence now.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 现在就把证据保存并整理好。

resultSummary.en: Your photos, receipts, packaging, and notes may be important for the next step.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你的照片、收据、包装和记录可能会对下一步非常重要。

summary.en: Put your receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes in one place
summary.zh-Hans: 把收据、包装、照片、视频和记录整理到一起

text.en: Put your receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes in one place.
text.zh-Hans: 把收据、包装、照片、视频和记录整理到一个地方。

summary.zh-Hans: 写下问题是在何时、如何发生的

text.en: Write down when and how the problem happened.
text.zh-Hans: 写下问题是在何时、如何发生的。

summary.en: Save anything the seller has already said
summary.zh-Hans: 保存卖家已经说过的内容

summary.en: Seller
summary.zh-Hans: 卖家

text.en: Seller
text.zh-Hans: 卖家

resultTitle.en: You may still need one clear follow-up.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 你可能还需要进行一次明确的跟进。

resultSummary.en: You have contacted the seller, but you still do not have a clear answer.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你已经联系过卖家，但仍然没有得到明确答复。

summary.en: Ask for a clear written reply
summary.zh-Hans: 要求对方给出明确的书面回复

text.en: Ask for a clear written reply.
text.zh-Hans: 要求对方给出明确的书面回复。

summary.zh-Hans: 用简单清楚的话说明问题

summary.en: Ask whether the seller will inspect, replace, or refund the product
summary.zh-Hans: 询问卖家是否会检查、更换或退款

text.en: Ask whether the seller will inspect, replace, or refund the product.

summary.en: Save any vague or dismissive reply
summary.zh-Hans: 保存任何含糊或敷衍的回复

text.en: Save any vague or dismissive reply.
text.zh-Hans: 保存任何含糊或敷衍的回复。

summary.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

text.en: Refund, replacement, or complaint pathway
text.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

resultTitle.en: This may need the next refund or complaint step.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 这件事可能需要进入下一步退款或投诉程序。

resultSummary.en: The seller has dismissed the issue or the problem still has not been resolved.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 卖家淡化了这个问题，或问题至今仍未解决。

summary.en: Do not keep repeating the same argument unless you have new evidence
summary.zh-Hans: 除非有新证据，否则不要重复同样的说法

text.en: Do not keep repeating the same argument unless you have new evidence.
text.zh-Hans: 除非你有新的证据，否则不要重复同样的说法。

summary.en: Save the seller's response
summary.zh-Hans: 保存卖家的回复

text.en: Save the seller's response.
text.zh-Hans: 保存卖家的回复。

summary.en: Ask for a clear written reply if needed
summary.zh-Hans: 如有需要，要求对方给出明确书面回复

text.en: Ask for a clear written reply if needed.
text.zh-Hans: 如有需要，要求对方给出明确的书面回复。

summary.en: Prepare your documents for the next refund, replacement, or complaint step
summary.zh-Hans: 为下一步退款、更换或投诉整理文件

text.zh-Hans: 为下一步退款、更换或投诉整理好文件。

summary.zh-Hans: 所有收据、包装、照片、记录和卖家回复

summary.zh-Hans: 退款、更换或投诉途径

resultTitle.en: Start with one clear seller contact.
resultTitle.zh-Hans: 先进行一次明确的卖家联系。

resultSummary.en: You have stopped using the product, but you have not clearly contacted the seller yet.
resultSummary.zh-Hans: 你已经停止使用该产品，但还没有清楚明确地联系卖家。

summary.en: Put your evidence together first
summary.zh-Hans: 先把证据整理好

default.en: Put your receipt, photos, packaging, and notes in one place.
default.zh-Hans: 把收据、照片、包装和记录整理到一个地方。

unsafe.en: Gather the receipt or proof of purchase, packaging or label, photos or video of the issue, and a short note about when and how the problem happened.

quality_or_fault.en: Gather the receipt, product photos, packaging or label details, and notes on what happened and when.
quality_or_fault.zh-Hans: 收集收据、产品照片、包装或标签信息，以及关于何时发生、发生了什么的记录。

uncertain_type.en: Gather any receipt, packaging, photos, videos, and notes you still have.
uncertain_type.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、包装、照片、视频和记录。

not_sure.zh-Hans: 收集您目前还保留的任何收据、包装、照片、视频和记录。

summary.en: Decide what you want to ask for before contacting the seller
summary.zh-Hans: 联系卖家前先明确自己想提出什么要求

text.en: Decide what you want to ask for before contacting the seller.
text.zh-Hans: 联系卖家之前，先明确自己想提出什么要求。

summary.en: Contact the seller clearly and explain what happened
summary.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家并说明发生了什么

default.en: Contact the seller clearly and explain what happened.
default.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家并说明发生了什么。

unsafe.en: Contact the seller clearly, explain what happened, and say why you are worried the product may be unsafe.
unsafe.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家，说明发生了什么，并解释你为何担心该产品可能不安全。

quality_or_fault.en: Contact the seller clearly and ask whether they will inspect, replace, or refund the product.
quality_or_fault.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家，并询问对方是否会检查、更换或退款。

uncertain_type.en: Contact the seller clearly, explain what feels wrong, and ask what they will do next.
uncertain_type.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家，说明哪里感觉不对，并询问对方接下来会怎么处理。

not_sure.en: Contact the seller clearly, explain what feels wrong, and ask what they will do next.
not_sure.zh-Hans: 清楚联系卖家，说明哪里感觉不对，并询问对方接下来会怎么处理。

summary.zh-Hans: 主要证据
